item.title: June Bug's Cup at Your Legacy FCU! - 07/10/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/10/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come get your June Bug's Cup Coffee and dirty sodas and energy drinks! This Friday at Your Legacy FCU!

item.title: ServSafe Manager Class - 07/10/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The ServSafe Manager course will be offered on July 10th and 17th. This class will consist of an instructor-led class with a 9th edition ServSafe manager textbook and online exam voucher included.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: ServSafe Manager Class on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 9th edition textbook and online exam voucher.

item.title: Bites & Bios - 07/10/2026 11:30am EDT to 07/10/2026 1:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Serving up iconic stories and themed lunch! Registration Required. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bites & Bios on Jul 10, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include registration required and seneca east public library.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/10/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin and tiffin's wild goose chase.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/10/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 4:00pm EDT

item.title: Preschool Pals—Fishing Fun - 07/10/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA For ages 3 to 5 years.  Join Linda Rose as we try to catch some fish in the pond.  Fishing poles and bait provided or bring your own. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Preschool Pals—Fishing Fun on Jul 10, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include preschool pals—fishing fun and Kids & Family.

item.title: Corner T Fun - 07/10/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on Jul 10, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including riegel and Food & Drink.

item.title: Ben & David Hohenstein Live Music - 07/10/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 6029 OH-101, Clyde, OH 43410, USA Friday Food Truck & Live Music at Sleepy Holllw RV Park. Archie’s Pizza will be here serving dinner starting at 4 & the Hohenstein twins with live music at 6!
item.dc:creator: Archie’s Pizza Truck
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ben & David Hohenstein Live Music on Jul 10, 2026 in Clyde, OH. Featured themes include food truck and live music.

item.title: Sonja & Friends Workshop - 07/10/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 113 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come join your friends to create your own personalized project. It will be a fun time out with new and old friends! Select any design, check out the "design" page of the website for options or scroll through past projects on the FB feed. Everyone can choose a different project.
item.dc:creator: Rustic Flair & Brush
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Sonja & Friends Workshop on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include sonja & friends workshop and friends workshop.

item.title: Nature Walk Bird Talk - 07/11/2026 8:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Spend the morning looking and listening to the sights and sounds of nature in the preserve as you walk the trails with Linda Rose.  Binoculars helpful.  This walk qualifies for the Walking Stick Program and lasts about 1 ¼ hour.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Nature Walk Bird Talk on Jul 11, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include nature walk bird talk and Outdoors.

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include affordable treats and chocolate covered strawberry cups.

item.title: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at JAM’s Markets every Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM for a delightful breakfast experience! Stop by 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio, and enjoy a variety of freshly made breakfast and lunch items, including delicious pierogi and artisanal sourdough breads. Our offerings are available while supplies last, so come early to savor these buzzworthy bites!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include artisan sourdough and breakfast.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fresh produce and sustainability.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include sustainability and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Scoops & Slices Trail Launch Day - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us as we officially launch the new Scoops & Slices Trail on Saturday, July 11! The kickoff begins with a Scoops & Slices Geocaching Trail Information Event from 10:30 AM to 11:30 AM at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library, hosted in partnership with Cachers Anonymous. Whether you're an experienced geocacher or have never found a cache before, you'll learn how the trail works, how to use the free digital pass, where to find the official geocaches, and how to earn the exclusive Scoops & Slices trackable geocoin. Destination Seneca County staff will also be available at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM to answer questions, help participants register for the free digital trail, and get you started on your Scoops & Slices adventure. The Scoops & Slices Trail is our largest interactive tourism experience yet, featuring 27 local pizza and ice cream destinations and 30 geocaches located throughout Seneca County. Complete five qualifying foodie stops to earn the official Scoops & Slices Skippy Hat, find 25 of the 30 official geocaches to earn the collectible trackable geocoin, or complete both adventures for the full experience. Whether you're looking to try a new pizza shop, cool off with some ice cream, discover a new hobby, or simply explore more of Seneca County, the Scoops & Slices Trail offers a fun way to experience everything our community has to offer. Visit http://SkippySeneca.com/ to register for your free digital pass and start your adventure.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Scoops & Slices Trail Launch Day on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include collectible geocoin and Travel.

item.title: Scoops & Slices Trail Launch Day - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us as we officially launch the new Scoops & Slices Trail on Saturday, July 11! The kickoff begins with a Scoops & Slices Geocaching Trail Information Event from 10:30 AM to 11:30 AM at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library, hosted in partnership with Cachers Anonymous. Whether you're an experienced geocacher or have never found a cache before, you'll learn how the trail works, how to use the free digital pass, where to find the official geocaches, and how to earn the exclusive Scoops & Slices trackable geocoin. Destination Seneca County staff will also be available at the Tiffin-Seneca Farmers Market from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM to answer questions, help participants register for the free digital trail, and get you started on your Scoops & Slices adventure. The Scoops & Slices Trail is our largest interactive tourism experience yet, featuring 27 local pizza and ice cream destinations and 30 geocaches located throughout Seneca County. Complete five qualifying foodie stops to earn the official Scoops & Slices Skippy Hat, find 25 of the 30 official geocaches to earn the collectible trackable geocoin, or complete both adventures for the full experience. Whether you're looking to try a new pizza shop, cool off with some ice cream, discover a new hobby, or simply explore more of Seneca County, the Scoops & Slices Trail offers a fun way to experience everything our community has to offer. Visit http://SkippySeneca.com/ to register for your free digital pass and start your adventure.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Scoops & Slices Trail Launch Day on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Travel and Food & Drink.

item.title: Breakfast & Bling w/ Linked by Savannah - 07/11/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 105 E Tiffin St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us on Saturday, July 11 during the Fostoria Farmers Market for a special morning at The UrbanWoody Brewery! Linked by Savannah will be on-site offering her beautiful permanent jewelry, making it the perfect time to treat yourself or create a lasting memory with a friend. We’ll also be serving up breakfast specials from the Brewtis Kitchen along with morning drink specials to help you kick off your Farmers Market adventure. Shop local, enjoy great food and drinks, and get linked while you’re downtown. We can’t wait to see you there!
item.dc:creator: The UrbanWoody Brewery & The HoneyBee Winery
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Breakfast & Bling w/ Linked by Savannah on Jul 11, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include local shopping and permanent jewelry.

item.title: Clyde Farmer's Market - 07/11/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 126 Railroad St, Clyde, OH 43410, USA We will be a vendor at the Clyde Farmer's Market on the second Saturday of the Month through October.
item.dc:creator: Homestead 6:33
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Clyde Farmer's Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Clyde, OH. Featured themes include vendor and Markets.

item.title: Freshly Baked at The Farmhouse - 07/11/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 11351 E Township Rd 44, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for a gathering of our best bakers around!! Grab some samples or take some home!
item.dc:creator: The Farmhouse Collection LLC
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Freshly Baked at The Farmhouse on Jul 11, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include best bakers and chatfield, ohio.

item.title: Family Fun Event—Insect Safari - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Join Linda Rose from 11AM to 2PM in the grasslands and trails as we look for insects along the ways.  Learn what makes an insect and insect and more.    Nets provided or bring your own. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Fun Event—Insect Safari on Jul 11, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include Outdoors and children.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 112 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tickets are on sale NOW for the Second Annual Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing The Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing is BACK — and bigger than ever!! Join us on Saturday, July 11, 2026 from 11 AM – 4 PM for a one-of-a-kind, Happy Gilmore-themed mini golf experience right through the heart of Downtown Tiffin, Ohio. Putt your way through 18 holes hosted by participating local businesses, explore everything downtown has to offer, and compete for trophies, gift baskets, gift cards, door prizes, and bragging rights — all in one unforgettable summer day. Tickets are $20 per golfer and going fast. Order online here: https://ssgink.com/shop/ols/products/2026-summer-downtown-mini-golf-outing-tickets Or purchase in person at SSG Ink or Simply Susan’s while supplies last. Online orders will be pulled the next business day, and you’ll be notified by text with pickup hours once your tickets are ready. Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Sports, Adult and 2026 downtown tiffin mini golf outing.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Sports, Youth.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 112 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tickets are on sale NOW for the Second Annual Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing The Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing is BACK — and bigger than ever!! Join us on Saturday, July 11, 2026 from 11 AM – 4 PM for a one-of-a-kind, Happy Gilmore-themed mini golf experience right through the heart of Downtown Tiffin, Ohio. Putt your way through 18 holes hosted by participating local businesses, explore everything downtown has to offer, and compete for trophies, gift baskets, gift cards, door prizes, and bragging rights — all in one unforgettable summer day. Tickets are $20 per golfer and going fast. Order online here: https://ssgink.com/shop/ols/products/2026-summer-downtown-mini-golf-outing-tickets Or purchase in person at SSG Ink or Simply Susan’s while supplies last. Online orders will be pulled the next business day, and you’ll be notified by text with pickup hours once your tickets are ready. Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.

item.title: Get out of the heat and join Landmark Seekers at Seneca Caverns July 11, 2026 - 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 15248 E Township Rd 178, Bellevue, OH 44811, USA Quest Announcement: Journey Into the Depths! See more. Stress less. Are you ready to trade the surface world for an underground adventure? Landmark Seekers is heading to Seneca Caverns—Ohio’s own Registered Natural Landmark and "The Caviest Cave in the U.S.A."! Join us as we explore the limestone passages, walk the legendary "Earth Crack," and witness the crystal-clear waters of the Ole Mist’ry River. Whether you're a geology enthusiast or just looking for a cool, subterranean escape, this is a quest you won't want to miss. The Details: When: Saturday, July 11, 2026 Where: 15248 E. Township Rd. 178, Bellevue, OH 44811 The Quest: A one-hour guided tour through seven levels of geological history. Travel Style: Drive-yourself (Meet us there!) Looking at 12-1pm or 1-2pm tour ! Pro-Tips for Seekers: Dress the Part: The cave stays a cool 54°F year-round, so bring a light jacket. Footwear: Wear sturdy, closed-toe shoes with good traction. We’ll be navigating natural stone steps and pathways! Memories: Still photography is welcome! (Please leave the tripods and selfie sticks at home to keep the tour moving smoothly). Membership Perks: As part of our commitment to "collective perks," your ticket purchase includes your official Landmark Seekers Membership ID. Don't forget to grab some gear or try your hand at gem mining while we're on-site! Ready to descend? [Link to Registration/Tickets] Note: Due to the natural terrain, this tour is not stroller or wheelchair accessible. Let’s make some memories underground!
item.dc:creator: Landmark Seekers
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Get out of the heat and join Landmark Seekers at Seneca Caverns July 11, 2026 on Jul 11, 2026 in Bellevue, OH. Featured themes include bellevue, ohio and exploration.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer activities.

item.title: Daybreak Service - 07/12/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/12/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for Daybreak Service at Trinity United Church of Christ — a peaceful 30-minute morning gathering to start your day with reflection and community. When: March 1, 2026, 8:30 AM. Where: 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH. All are welcome. #DaybreakService #TrinityUCC #TiffinOH #MorningWorship #Community
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Daybreak Service on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include daybreak service and morning worship.

item.title: Sunday School and Church Service - 07/12/2026 9:30am EDT to 07/12/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 9:30am-10:30am Sunday School Classes for Toddlers, Kids, Youth, and Adults on Sunday mornings that study the Bible and talk about applying it to our lives. 10:30am Worship followed by Sunday Service. 10:50am Online, worship at home and join us on Facebook or YouTube at 10:50am live, or watch later at your convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Sunday School and Church Service on Jul 12, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include sunday school and church service and Religious.

item.title: Service of the Word - 07/12/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/12/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for worship, Sunday mornings at 10:00 am. In person or online via Facebook and Youtube. (search: Trinity UCC Tiffin)

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Service of the Word on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include worship and Religious.

item.title: 26th Annual SCPD Photo Contest Public Viewing - 07/12/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/12/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Spend the afternoon looking at the photo entries for the 26th Annual SCPD Photo Contest and then enjoy a walk in the park from 1pm to 4pm.
